basic_details.job_title: Ordnance Factory Katni Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Ordnance Factory Katni has released the official Executive (Finance & Accounts) Notification 2026 at Ordnance Factory Katni ddpdoo.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the OFK Executive (Finance & Accounts) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 45 years with a qualification of Member of ICAI or ICMAI along with relevant experience can apply offline up to 10 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Member of Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) Or Member of Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI)
qualification.details: Member of Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) Or Member of Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI) Minimum 2 years relevant experience (post qualification) in any organization after becoming member of ICAI/ICMAI. Should be well versed in financial management Indian Accounting standards, Accounting, Audit, Cost and Budgetary Control, Working Capital Management, Taxation, Treasury Management, Tender Evaluation, Vetting of Contracts etc. Should be well versed with working in computerized environment. Should be well conversant with TALLY.

salary_details.salary_range: Rs. 1,00,000/- (Fixed) for first two years & Rs.1,10,000/-(fixed) for 3rd& 4th year.
salary_details.details: Rs. 1,00,000/- (Fixed) per month for the first two years. Rs. 1,10,000/- (Fixed) per month for the 3rd and 4th year.

selection_process: Personal Interview Meeting of required Educational Qualification and Experience criteria
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Ordnance Factory Katni Executive (Finance & Accounts) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: ddpdoo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Ordnance Factory Katni Executive (Finance & Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Executive (Finance & Accounts) post is 10th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) or a Member of the Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI) to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Executive (Finance & Accounts) role?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2 years of relevant post-qualification experience is required. This experience should be gained after becoming a member of ICAI or ICMAI.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Executive (Finance & Accounts) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Executive (Finance & Accounts) post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Executive (Finance & Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The salary is fixed at Rs. 1,00,000/- per month for the first two years and Rs. 1,10,000/- per month for the 3rd and 4th year.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to submit your application form in hard copy via speed post or courier to the specified address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Personal Interview. Candidates must also meet the required educational qualification and experience criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Ordnance Factory Katni located?
faq.answer: Ordnance Factory Katni is located in Katni, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 483504.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
